task: Use RAG-grounded hospital, doctor, and nurse agents to create a real-time care-coordination inference for an acute ED patient.
chief_concern: Shortness of breath and chest pressure for two hours.
notes: History of hypertension and type 2 diabetes.
Patient reports worsening symptoms when walking.
Family is available for medication history.
requested_inference: Coordinate immediate triage, clinical review, and bedside handoff priorities.
